name: kurdbox-monorepo
description: KurdBox AI Gateway - Monorepo with unified commands

scripts.extension:build: cd extension && npm run compile && npm run package
scripts.extension:install: cd extension && npm run package && code --install-extension ./kurdbox-1.0.1.vsix --force
scripts.install:all: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../extension && npm install

author: Kurdost
